Frequently asked questions

What's the best thing about Switzerland?

I don't know, but the flag is a big plus. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Quas cupiditate laboriosam fugiat.

How do you make holy water?

You boil the hell out of it. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Magnam, repudiandae.

What do you call someone with no body and no nose?

Nobody knows. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Cupiditate, animi.

Why do you never see elephants hiding in trees?

Because they're so good at it. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Magnam.
